title: populus cathayana var. pedicellata
intro: Populus cathayana var. pedicellata, also known as Chinese poplar or riverbank poplar, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities, which help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infection. The health benefits of Populus cathayana var. pedicellata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Populus cathayana var. pedicellata often involve infusions of its leaves, bark, or roots, which can be used as teas, tinctures, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
